title: Kill Counter
description: This mod allows you to see how many players you've killed on the server.
body:
**This mod allows you to see how many players you've killed on the server.**   
To do this, press "K". You can reset the counter.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zzvMBWsZKxg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
